title: Banished From The Hero's Party, I Decided To Live A Quiet Life In The Countryside
title_japanese: 真の仲間じゃないと勇者のパーティーを追い出されたので、辺境でスローライフすることにしました
title_synonyms: Banished from the Hero's Party, I Decided to Live a Quiet Life in the Countryside, I Was Kicked out of the Hero's Party Because I Wasn't a True Companion so I Decided to Have a Slow Life at the Frontier
